story: Teen foster children stabbed 13-year-old boy who just arrived then held him underwater in a lake until he drowned: Police
title: Tragic Twist in Foster Care Nightmare
script:
A 13-year-old boy was stabbed and then drowned in a foster home. 

Two foster children, just teenagers themselves, allegedly committed this heinous act, sparking outrage and concern over the foster care system. The details of this case are particularly disturbing, as the victims were also the perpetrators' new siblings, who had only just arrived at the home. The motives behind this crime are still unclear, but one thing is certain: something went horribly wrong in this family. Who else is at risk in the foster care system?
